export class WantedListParser{constructor(){this._data=[];}flush(){this._data=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const count=wrapper.readInt();const list=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const userId=wrapper.readInt();const username=wrapper.readString();const figure=wrapper.readString();const wantedLevel=wrapper.readInt();const charges=wrapper.readString();const chargesList=charges?charges.split(',').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean):[];list.push({userId,username,figure,wantedLevel,charges,chargesList});}this._data=list;// 🔥 Broadcast event so UI updates immediately
window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('wanted_list_update',{detail:this._data}));return true;}getWantedUsers(){return this._data;}}
